scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && bunx wrangler deploy
scripts.build:all: npm run build:verdict-notebook && npm run build:notebook && npm run build
scripts.test:notebook: npm run build:test-eval && node --test tests-js/notebook-unit.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-bridge.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-bindings.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-shell.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-integration.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-vm-integration.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-vm-actors.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-verdict-actor.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-verdict-ide.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-display.test.mjs
